title: Niterói、RJ — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Niterói、RJの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

NiteróiはRJにある人口515,317の都市です。Across Guanabara Bay from Rio, known for its high quality of life, the Niemeyer-designed MAC museum, and stunning coastal views.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
